question: [File: 'File Name: graphql/src/main/resources/graphql/query.graphqls -> Scope: Critical: Network partition caused outside of design parameters'] [Function: account(input: AccountInput!)] Can an unprivileged external user flood POST /graphql/alpha with concurrent account() queries using valid entityId inputs to exhaust the HikariCP connection pool (hikaricp_connections_max), causing the GraphQL service to become unable to serve any requests and triggering a network partition condition where the service is reachable but all queries hang indefinitely?
